---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
---

# Education

-   B.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2022 - ongoing.

# Work Experience

## Employements

None

## Internships

1.  ESEN SYSTEM Integration, Quality Management Systems Intern, 08/2025-09/2025

# Projects

EMU-405 Graduation Project-Optimization of Production Scheduling in Industrial Kitchen Equipment Manufacturing Using Genetic 

Algorithms Akbank Case Maratonu-Finadvisor

# Competencies

R, Quarto, Git, Python, AutoCad

# Hobbies

Motorcycle sports, DJ, Travelling

<p>
You can download my CV here:

<a href="cv.pdf" target="_blank">Download my CV</a>
</p>
